name: Sarbacane Engage (Datananas) API
description: Sarbacane Engage (formerly Datananas) is a sales engagement software that helps you reach your contacts with intelligent and automated multichannel sequences. This API provides endpoints for managing contacts, email guessing, blacklists, activities, sequences, messages, templates, and more.
